title: taraxacum mariae
intro: Taraxacum mariae, commonly known as the dwarf dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum mariae include improving digestion, reducing blood pressure, and boosting the immune system. Taraxacum mariae is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
